## Auth

> ⚠️ **1 critical rule**

### Password

- 🔵 Password must be at least 12 characters
  <br>📍 `auth/password.ts:1`
  <br>`export const MIN_PASSWORD_LENGTH = 12;`

- 🟡 **[warning]** Passwords expire after 90 days for enterprise accounts `AUTH-31`
  <br>📍 `auth/password.ts:4`
  <br>`export const PASSWORD_EXPIRY_DAYS = 90;`

### Session

- 🔴 **[critical]** Session expires after 24 hours of inactivity
  <br>📍 `auth/session.ts:1`
  <br>`export const SESSION_TTL_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;`

- 🟡 **[warning]** Maximum 3 concurrent sessions per user `AUTH-12`
  <br>📍 `auth/session.ts:4`
  <br>`export const MAX_CONCURRENT_SESSIONS = 3;`

---

## Billing

> ⚠️ **3 critical rules**

### Plans

- 🔴 **[critical]** Free plan is limited to 100 API requests per day
  <br>📍 `billing/plans.ts:1`
  <br>`export const FREE_PLAN_DAILY_LIMIT = 100;`

- 🔴 **[critical]** Pro plan allows up to 10,000 API requests per day
  <br>📍 `billing/plans.ts:4`
  <br>`export const PRO_PLAN_DAILY_LIMIT = 10_000;`

- 🔵 Trial period lasts 14 days with full Pro features `BILL-47`
  <br>📍 `billing/plans.ts:7`
  <br>`export const TRIAL_PERIOD_DAYS = 14;`

### Refunds

- 🔴 **[critical]** Refunds must be requested within 30 days of purchase
  <br>📍 `billing/limits.ts:1`
  <br>`export const REFUND_WINDOW_DAYS = 30;`

### Usage

- 🟡 **[warning]** Users exceeding 80% of their plan limit receive a warning email
  <br>📍 `billing/limits.ts:4`
  <br>`export const USAGE_WARNING_THRESHOLD = 0.8;`

---

## Notifications

### Email

- 🟡 **[warning]** Maximum 3 reminder emails per billing cycle
  <br>📍 `notifications/email.ts:1`
  <br>`export const MAX_REMINDERS_PER_CYCLE = 3;`
